title: Hula Dancing in Hawaiian Culture
content_html:
Hula Dancing in Hawaiian Culture

Many people dream of visiting the beautiful Hawaiian Islands. Mention of this Pacific paradise evokes images of women in grass skirts swaying their hips as they perform graceful island dances for the benefit of tourists. Although this image is a common stereotype of Hawaii, it has its roots in a real tradition that continues to play an important role in Hawaiian culture.

Hula dancing has always been part of Hawaiian life. Hawaiian mythology includes various stories that explain the origins of hula, each story attributing its creation to a different god or goddess and its first appearance to a different location. In reality, hula dancing is such an ancient tradition that it is impossible to say when or where it first appeared. It was most likely originally performed in front of an altar in honor of gods and accompanied by great ritual. It is a common belief that the ancient hula was danced only by men, but some scholars point to evidence suggesting that hula was traditionally danced by both men and women.

The English explorer Captain James Cook's visit to the islands in the eighteenth century caused many changes to Hawaiian society as a result of the contact with European culture. Although hula did not completely disappear after contact, it was discouraged. King David Kalakaua is credited with reviving hula dancing during his reign in the late nineteenth century. He was interested in reestablishing lost traditions, and hula was performed at celebrations held in his honor.

In the 1960s, a Hawaiian cultural festival was established as part of an effort to attract more tourists to the islands. A major part of this festival consisted of hula competitions, which were organized into categories of hula kahiko, or hula danced in the ancient style, and hula auana, or modern hula. This festival, called the Merrie Monarch Festival in honor of King David Kalakaua, has become a major annual cultural event. The hula competition is a central part of the festival and has had a significant influence on modern hula dancing.

Hula continues to be danced in both the ancient and modern styles. Traditional hula is an energetic dance performed to the accompaniment of chants and the beating of drums. The dancers wear traditional costumes consisting of garlands of leaves, skirts of tapa (a type of bark), and anklets made of animal bone. Many of the movements of modern hula are based on the ancient hula, but the modern style is slower and more graceful. It is danced to flowing guitar and ukulele music, and the dancers wear elaborate costumes, including the famous Hawaiian floral garlands known as leis.

Hula has attracted the interest of people outside the islands, and hula schools can be found in many parts of the world. Although people of other nationalities learn to dance some form of hula, it is also danced by Hawaiians who live away from the islands, on the mainland United States, in Europe, and elsewhere. It has become a way for native Hawaiians to maintain their cultural identity even while living away from their island homeland. What was once a religious ritual has become a form of entertainment, not only for tourists, but also for native Hawaiians who seek to maintain connections with their cultural heritage.

questions.question: Originally, hula was danced
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
Originally
hula
danced

👉 Từ khóa quan trọng nhất là Originally (ban đầu).

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn 2:

"It was most likely originally performed in front of an altar in honor of gods..."

Bước 3: Phân tích
originally performed = ban đầu được biểu diễn
in front of an altar = trước bàn thờ
Paraphrase: in front of an altar=near an altar

Đáp án: D

_blockConfig.noteContent:
**A type of parrot:**
- diet consists of fern fronds, various parts of a tree and [1]
- nests are created in [2] where eggs are laid.
**Arrival of settlers**
- the [3] of the kākāpō were used to make clothes.

questions.question: Hula dancing was discouraged
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
discouraged
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn
Đoạn 3:

"Although hula did not completely disappear after contact, it was discouraged."

Bước 3: Phân tích

Câu trước nói:
"contact with European culture"
Nghĩa là:
sau khi người Hawaii tiếp xúc với người châu Âu
hula bị hạn chế, không được khuyến khích
Paraphrase:
after contact with Europeans=after contact with European culture
=> Đáp án B

questions.text: Hula was revived in the nineteenth century by
questions.question: Hula was revived in the nineteenth century by
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
revived
nineteenth century
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn 3:

"King David Kalakaua is credited with reviving hula dancing during his reign in the late nineteenth century."

Bước 3: Phân tích
revive = phục hồi
King David Kalakaua = Vua David Kalakaua
a Hawaiian king = một vị vua Hawaii

Paraphrase:

King David Kalakaua

a Hawaiian king

=> Người khôi phục điệu nhảy hula là một vị vua Hawaii.

Đáp án: A

questions.text: Modern hula dances are accompanied by
questions.question: Modern hula dances are accompanied by
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
Modern hula
accompanied by
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn 5:

"It is danced to flowing guitar and ukulele music."

Bước 3: Phân tích
guitar music = nhạc guitar
accompanied by = được đệm bởi

Paraphrase:

guitar music

guitars

=> Hula hiện đại được biểu diễn cùng nhạc guitar và ukulele.

Đáp án: B

questions.text: modern hula is more ______ and flowing
questions.question: modern hula is more ______ and flowing
questions.groupHtml:
Questions 5–7

Complete the summary using the list of phrases, A–E, below.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
modern hula
flowing
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn 5:

"the modern style is slower and more graceful"

Bước 3: Phân tích
more graceful = duyên dáng hơn
flowing = uyển chuyển

Câu tóm tắt:

more ______ and flowing

khớp với:

more graceful

Đáp án: graceful

_blockConfig.noteContent: Hula dancing has been part of Hawaiian culture since ancient times, although the styles of dancing have changed over time. The traditional style of hula dancing, which is still performed, is fast, whereas modern hula is more [5] and flowing. Dancers of modern hula wear costumes that are [6], and dancers of ancient hula wear simpler traditional costumes. People everywhere are interested in hula, including Hawaiians living in other parts of the world. The fact that hula is danced by Hawaiians living away from their homeland is [7] of its importance to Hawaiian culture.

questions.questionHtml: Hula dancing has been part of Hawaiian culture since ancient times, although the styles of dancing have changed over time. The traditional style of hula dancing, which is still performed, is fast, whereas modern hula is more 5_______ and flowing. Dancers of modern hula wear costumes that are 6_______, and dancers of ancient hula wear simpler traditional costumes. People everywhere are interested in hula, including Hawaiians living in other parts of the world. The fact that hula is danced by Hawaiians living away from their homeland is 7_______ of its importance to Hawaiian culture.

questions.text: Dancers of modern hula wear costumes that are ______
questions.question: Dancers of modern hula wear costumes that are ______
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
modern hula
costumes
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn 5:
"the dancers wear elaborate costumes"
Bước 3: Phân tích
elaborate = cầu kỳ, công phu
costumes = trang phục
Paraphrase:
elaborate costumes=costumes that are elaborate
Đáp án: elaborate

questions.text: The fact that hula is danced by Hawaiians living away from their homeland is ______ of its importance to Hawaiian culture.
questions.question: The fact that hula is danced by Hawaiians living away from their homeland is ______ of its importance to Hawaiian culture.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
importance
Hawaiians living away
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn
Đoạn cuối:
"It has become a way for native Hawaiians to maintain their cultural identity"

Bước 3: Phân tích
Người Hawaii vẫn nhảy hula dù sống xa quê hương.
Điều này cho thấy tầm quan trọng của hula đối với văn hóa Hawaii.
evidence = bằng chứng
Paraphrase:
evidence of its importance
Đáp án: evidence

questions.text: Hula is a_______ dance from Hawaii.
questions.question: Hula is a_______ dance from Hawaii.
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống đứng giữa mạo từ a và danh từ dance (a .......... dance). Theo cấu trúc cụm danh từ, vị trí này yêu cầu một Tính từ.

Xét từ loại:

tradition: Danh từ (truyền thống).

traditional: Tính từ (thuộc về truyền thống)-> CHỌN
traditionally: Trạng từ.

Dịch nghĩa: Hula là một điệu nhảy truyền thống đến từ Hawaii.

_blockConfig.noteContent:
**A type of parrot:**
- diet consists of fern fronds, various parts of a tree and [1]
- nests are created in [2] where eggs are laid.
**Arrival of settlers**
- the [3] of the kākāpō were used to make clothes.

questions.text: Originally, it was performed as part of religious rituals. It was danced _______
questions.question: Originally, it was performed as part of religious rituals. It was danced _______
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống nằm sau động từ bị động was danced để bổ nghĩa cho toàn bộ hành động nhảy này diễn ra như thế nào. Vị trí này yêu cầu một Trạng từ.

Xét từ loại:

energy: Danh từ.

energetic: Tính từ.

energetically: Trạng từ (một cách mạnh mẽ/nhiệt huyết)-> CHỌN
Dịch nghĩa: Nó được nhảy một cách mạnh mẽ/tràn đầy năng lượng theo...

questions.text: It was danced 9...........to the 10 ______ of drums and chants.
questions.question: It was danced 9...........to the 10 ______ of drums and chants.
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống nằm trong cấu trúc kinh điển the + Noun + of (to the .......... of drums). Vị trí này bắt buộc phải điền một Danh từ.

Xét từ loại:

accompany: Động từ.

accompaniment: Danh từ (sự đệm nhạc/âm thanh đi kèm)-> CHỌN
Dịch nghĩa: Nó được nhảy một cách mạnh mẽ dưới sự đệm nhạc của trống và những tiếng hô vang.

questions.text: Over time it has been_______in different ways, and styles have changed.
questions.question: Over time it has been_______in different ways, and styles have changed.
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống nằm trong cấu trúc bị động của thì Hiện tại hoàn thành has been + V3/ed (has been .......... in different ways). Ta cần một Động từ quá khứ phân từ.

Xét từ loại:

influence: Danh từ / Động từ nguyên mẫu.

influential: Tính từ.

influenced: Động từ V3/ed (bị ảnh hưởng, được tác động)-> CHỌN
Dịch nghĩa: Theo thời gian, nó đã bị ảnh hưởng/tác động theo nhiều cách khác nhau, và các phong cách cũng đã thay đổi.

questions.text: Modern hula is a more graceful dance performed to guitar and ukulele music. It is performed for tourists and also as part of______
questions.question: Modern hula is a more graceful dance performed to guitar and ukulele music. It is performed for tourists and also as part of______
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống đứng sau giới từ of trong cụm từ "as part of" (như là một phần của). Vị trí này yêu cầu một Danh từ. Để phù hợp với ý nghĩa "các lễ hội/buổi ăn mừng nói chung", danh từ cần được chia số nhiều.

Xét từ loại:

celebrate: Động từ.

celebrations: Danh từ đếm được số nhiều (các lễ kỷ niệm/lễ hội)-> CHỌN 
celebratory: Tính từ.

Dịch nghĩa: Nó được biểu diễn cho du khách xem và cũng như là một phần của các buổi lễ/lễ hội.

questions.text: The wide interest in hula dancing is _______ for Hawaii, because it helps attract tourists to the islands.
questions.question: The wide interest in hula dancing is _______ for Hawaii, because it helps attract tourists to the islands.
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống đứng sau động từ liên kết is và trước giới từ for (is .......... for Hawaii). Vị trí này đóng vai trò làm vị ngữ, cần điền một Tính từ.

Xét từ loại:

benefit: Danh từ / Động từ.

beneficial: Tính từ (có lợi, mang lại lợi ích)-> CHỌN
beneficially: Trạng từ.

Dịch nghĩa: Sự quan tâm rộng rãi dành cho điệu nhảy hula là rất có lợi cho Hawaii, bởi vì nó giúp thu hút khách du lịch đến với các hòn đảo.
